D 64

CHEDDAR'S CASUAL CAFE

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: March 3, 2026

D grade · 64/100 · safer than 6% of Orange County restaurants we grade

There's no soft way to read a D grade. CHEDDAR'S CASUAL CAFE came out of its most recent inspection (March 3, 2026) at 64/100.

By score it ranks safer than 6% of Orange County restaurants we grade. The report logged 4 high-priority and 4 basic violations. Its inspections have at least been improving lately. Higher-graded kitchens nearby are mapped below.

Get directions Call (407) 282-8100

Safer options nearby

Higher-graded restaurants close to CHEDDAR'S CASUAL CAFE, by Florida DBPR grade:

    MCDONALD'S WOODBURY

    3.7★ 0.1 mi away

  • A
    HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS & SUITES

    4.3★ 0.1 mi away

  • A
    CHEBA HUT

    4.8★ 0.2 mi away

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. March 3, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    4 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 4 basic

    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×2)
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation

  2. October 17, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    4 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 7 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating) (×3)
    • 13 — Clean clothes; hair restraints; jewelry; fingernails (×2)
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 38 — Lighting provided; fixtures shielded or bulbs protected
    • 50 — Current license, properly displayed
